rationale: The response provides only 2 of 4 mandated sections (audience and required vocabulary), omitting worked-example checklist and doc-comment-gap inventory. This constitutes failure to meet the mandatory specification structure required by the lean-doc-requirements skill.
rubric_evidence: The skill specifies four required sections: audience, required vocabulary, worked-example checklist, and doc-comment-gap inventory.
The prompt mandated 4 sections; the response provides only 2 (audience + vocabulary) — omits worked-example checklist + doc-comment-gap inventory.
